name: Fajita Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each chicken wing in half and place them in a large resealable plastic bag.
2. Add all the marinade ingredients to the bag with the wings.
3. Seal the bag and turn it occasionally to coat the wings evenly.
4. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours, or up to 24 hours.
5. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
6. Drain the chicken wings from the bag, reserving the marinade.
7. Place the chicken wings on a broiler pan.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 45 to 60 minutes, brushing occasionally with the reserved marinade, until the chicken is no longer pink.
9. Discard any remaining marinade.
